pageContext.name: An American Werewolf In London Editions Variant
pageContext.description: 'I was murdered, an unnatural death, and now I walk the earth in limbo until the werewolf's curse is lifted.'  Sideshow and Vice Press present An American Werewolf In London Editions Variant Fine Art Print by Matt Ferguson!  This 16.5 x 23.4 limited edition fine art pigment print is unframed and hand-numbered on Mohawk 270gsm Ultrawhite paper with archival inks and an authenticity hologram on the reverse. Printed in the UK by White Duck Editions.  A must-have for horror fans!
